text:
is a song by Hikaru Utada. https://vgmdb.net/album/32977 It was released on the EP Beautiful World/Kiss & Cry. It was the ending theme of the film Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone, which was the first film in the series Rebuild of Evangelion. Another version named "Beautiful World -PLANiTb Acoustica Mix-" was the theme of Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance, which was the second film in the series. It received three different versions on the EP One Last Kiss in 2021.

Staff

Composition: Hikaru Utada
Lyrics: Hikaru Utada
Arrangements: Hikaru Utada
Vocals: Hikaru Utada

Discography

2007: Beautiful World/Kiss & Cry
2008: Evangelion: 1.0 You Are (Not) Alone Original Soundtrack
2009: "Beautiful World -PLANiTb Acoustica Mix-"

References

 
Since Utada had not read the film's script before writing the theme songs for any of the first three Rebuild of Evangelion films, https://twitter.com/utadahikaru/status/1378156202069229569 Utada took her inspirations from Shinji wanting to see his friends and the real world again at the end of The End of Evangelion, and Asuka's realization that she did desire love from other people. Hikaru Utada's official interview on June 26, 2007 on Beautiful World 
Utada's relationship with her mother, a musician herself, and her mental illness later in life influenced her Eva songs. For this reason, out of all of the Eva characters she identified the most with Asuka. https://web.archive.org/web/20210314132410/http://dekakoushi.blog110.fc2.com/blog-entry-326.html
